tr: Onların evi bir futbol sahası kadar büyük.
en: Their house is as big as a football field.
Your hands are as small as a baby's.

tr: Onun (erkek) hayatı bir kelebek kadar kısa.
en: His life is as short as a butterfly's.

tr: Ali, NBA'deki basketbolcular kadar uzun boylu.
en: Ali is as tall as the basketball players in the NBA.
The life is as short as a day.

tr: Bu adam bir fil kadar şişman.
en: This man is as fat as an elephant.
You are as thin as a skeleton.

tr: Benim telefonum seninki kadar yeni değil.
en: My phone isn't as new as yours.

tr: Senin telefonun benimki kadar eski mi?
en: Is your phone as old as mine?

tr: Ayşe dedesi kadar yaşlı bir adamla evlenmek istemiyor.
en: Ayşe doesn't want to marry a man as old as her grandfather.

tr: Bu araba, bir ev kadar pahalı.
en: This car is as expensive as a house.
Ankara is as cold as Siberia in the winters.
Antalya is as hot as hell in the summers.

tr: Senin annen bir melek kadar güzeldir.
en: Your mother is as beautiful as an angel.
Math isn't as easy as Turkish.
Turkish isn't as difficult as math.
alt: Turkish isn't as hard as math.

en: My heart is as light as a feather.

tr: Akşam yemeğinden sonra bir fil kadar ağır hissediyorum.
en: I feel as heavy as an elephant after dinner.
The leaves are as soft as a pillow.
Your skin is as soft as a baby's.
The man's hands are as hard as a stone.
You aren't as weak as me.

tr: Benim babam Muhammed Ali kadar güçlüdür.
en: My father is as strong as Muhammad Ali.
Ayşe's family is as rich as a sultan.
I'm not as poor as them.
I'm as smart as the children in the classroom.

tr: Sınıftaki çocuklar benim kadar akıllı değil.
en: The children in the classroom aren't as smart as me.
You are as stupid as me.
alt: You are as silly as me.

en: This food is as good as my mother's.

tr: Benim yemeklerim seninkiler kadar iyi değil.
en: My meals aren't as good as yours.

tr: Benim yemeklerim seninkiler kadar kötü değil.
en: My meals aren't as bad as yours.

tr: Ağrı Dağı Everest kadar yüksek değil.
en: Mount Ararat isn't as high as Everest.
Kizilirmak isn't as long as the Nile.
My grandfather is as ill as my grandmother.
alt: My grandfather is as sick as my grandmother.

en: You are as healthy as a pig.

tr: Ben 30 yıl sonra senin kadar sağlıklı olmak istiyorum.
en: I want to be as healthy as you after 30 years.
Ali is as dangerous as a shark.
This place is as safe as your father's house.

tr: Gömleğim kadar temiz bir hayata başlamak istiyorum.
en: I want to start a life as clean as my shirt.

tr: Senin annen benimki kadar tertipli mi?
en: Is your mother as tidy as mine?
This question is as important as life.
This bed is as comfortable as mine.
Ali is as boring as Ahmet.
Ali is as bored as Ahmet.
Is Ahmet as boring as Ali?
Is English as easy as Turkish?
You are as funny as Jim Carrey.

tr: Bu kitap seninki kadar eğlenceli değil.
en: This book isn't as fun as yours.

tr: Sen benim için annem kadar önemlisin.
en: You are as important as my mother for me.

tr: Sen benim için bir elmas kadar özelsin.
en: You are as special as a diamond for me.

tr: Senin hayatın benimki kadar sıradan mı?
en: Is your life as ordinary as mine?

tr: Elon Musk kadar zengin olmak istiyorum.
en: I want to be as rich as Elon Musk.
I'm as happy as a child.
I'm as unhappy as you.
Are you as tired as me?
I'm as hungry as a wolf.
Are you as thirsty as me?
We aren't as busy as them.

tr: Ankara'daki trafik İstanbul kadar yoğun değil.
en: The traffic in Ankara isn't as busy as in Istanbul.
I'm as angry as a bull.
My clothes are as white as the clouds.
My future is as far as my past.
You are as close as my uncle.
You are as beautiful as a butterfly.
As ugly as a monkey.
As rich as kings.

tr: Sen İngilizcede benim kadar iyi misin?
en: Are you as good as me at English?

tr: Ben Almancada senin kadar kötü değilim.
en: I'm not as bad  as you at German.
I'm not as stupid as Ali.
I'm not as smart as you.

tr: Superman kadar güçlü olmak ister misin?
en: Do you want to be as strong as Superman?

tr: Superman kadar hızlı uçmak ister misin?
en: Do you want to fly as fast as Superman?
